message:
refactor(indexer): migrate test-only rusqlite meta INSERT to frankensqlite (uiojh)

The last two rusqlite:: call sites in src/indexer/mod.rs were in test
code: a plain INSERT into the meta user table (key/value pair
seeding 'historical_bundle_salvaged:test'). This is NOT a
writable_schema path — it's a regular user-table write that fsqlite
handles fully. Per AGENTS.md Rule 2, migrated to frankensqlite::
Connection::open + execute_compat with ParamValue wrappers.

After this commit, src/ has only 2 remaining rusqlite:: references —
both inside rusqlite_test_fixture_conn in src/storage/sqlite.rs,
which genuinely needs PRAGMA writable_schema write support. That
remains blocked on upstream bead coding_agent_session_search-mot85.

VERIFICATION:
cargo test --lib indexer::tests::full_rebuild: 2/2 pass (both
full_rebuild_requires_historical_restart and
full_rebuild_restart_ignores_stale_progress_when_canonical_is_healthy
— the two tests that depended on the migrated meta-seed code path).

rch exec cargo check --tests: green in 100s.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-uiojh; the final two
writable_schema-bound sites remain blocked on mot85.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
